title: Ralph-loop 2.0? The real autonomous coder is coming...
summary: AI Jason discusses emerging autonomous coding features including the /goal feature and /Mission exploration for long horizontal tasks. The video covers how these features work, setup instructions, and goal-oriented prompting techniques in tools like Crewlet and Superdesign.
